
### `docs/08_interoperability_guide.md`

```markdown
# Interoperability Guide

This project includes modern interoperability concepts beyond traditional HL7 and X12.

## Standards and Frameworks

| Standard | Purpose |
|---|---|
| FHIR | API-based clinical data exchange |
| CARIN Blue Button | Patient access to claims/EOB data |
| Da Vinci | Payer-provider workflow APIs |
| TEFCA | Nationwide health information exchange framework |
| Consent | Patient permission for data sharing |
